body:
REQUEST_CHANGES
Snapshot updates missing: a visual restyle of the beads table will invalidate any Playwright screenshot baselines for the beads list. The commit contains zero changes under `cli/internal/server/frontend/` test/snapshot directories. Re-run `bun run test:e2e -- --grep 'beads' --update-snapshots` from `cli/internal/server/frontend/`, commit the regenerated `*-snapshots/` PNGs, and confirm the run is green.
artifact: .ddx/executions/20260430T052535-c80c4007/reviewer-stream.log

post-merge review: REQUEST_CHANGES
Snapshot updates missing: a visual restyle of the beads table will invalidate any Playwright screenshot baselines for the beads list. The commit contains zero changes under `cli/internal/server/frontend/` test/snapshot directories. Re-run `bun run test:e2e -- --grep 'beads' --update-snapshots` from `cli/internal/server/frontend/`, commit the regenerated `*-snapshots/` PNGs, and confirm the run is green.
Minor (not blocking): the `default` branch of `statusBadgeClass` falls back to `badge-status-open`, which would silently mis-label any unknown future status as "open" styling. Consider a neutral fallback class instead.
